overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character in a futuristic suit with a large backpack traversing a desolate volcanic landscape. The character walks steadily along a rocky shoreline, through shallow water with grass patches, up a rocky slope, and across an open plateau under an overcast sky.

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along rocky shoreline with large volcanic boulders on the right and shallow water on the left

entered.detail: large dark volcanic rock formations lining the right side of the path
calm shallow water body running parallel to the shoreline
hazy mountain range visible in the background under overcast sky
uneven ground composed of black volcanic stones and pebbles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky shoreline flanked by large black volcanic boulders on the right and shallow water on the left. The terrain is uneven with loose stones, and distant mountains are visible through the hazy overcast sky. Around the 12-second mark, the character steps from the rocky shore into the shallow water.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water with patches of brown grass and reeds visible beneath the surface

entered.detail: patches of brown grass and reeds growing in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character moves through shallow water with sparse brown grass patches visible beneath the surface. The large volcanic rock formations recede into the mid-distance on the right as the character progresses through the wetland area. The water is calm and the distant mountains remain visible ahead.

events.description: character begins ascending rocky slope away from water

agents.ego_description: climbing up a rocky volcanic slope away from the water, navigating uneven black terrain

entered.detail: steep incline of black volcanic rock leading upward away from the water

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to dry land and begins ascending a rocky volcanic slope. The terrain consists of loose black rocks and sparse vegetation. The camera follows from behind as the character climbs steadily, with the water body now falling away behind and the open plateau ahead becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open volcanic plateau with valley overlook

events.description: approaching cliff edge revealing expansive valley with water below

agents.ego_description: traversing open rocky plateau toward an overlook with expansive views of the valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: wide valley with water visible in the distance below the plateau edge
drop-off at the edge of the plateau overlooking the valley below

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an expansive open plateau of black volcanic rock with sparse vegetation. The terrain is relatively flat compared to the previous slope. As the character approaches the far edge of the plateau around 55 seconds, a cliff edge comes into view revealing a wide valley with water below and distant mountains on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a desolate volcanic landscape, moving from a narrow shoreline through wetlands and up toward an expansive plateau. It begins with the character walking along a rocky coast flanked by large black boulders and hazy mountains before stepping off the shore into shallow water. As the character progresses through this wetland area, the volcanic formations recede into the distance and sparse brown grass appears beneath the calm surface. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the water to ascend a steep volcanic slope of loose black rock, leaving the shoreline behind. Finally, the camera follows the character across a flat, open plateau of dark stone until it reaches a cliff edge that reveals a wide valley and distant mountains on the horizon.
